update.releaseNotes:
v5.8.1 - Changelog
> **Note:** No changes have been made to accomodate the patch on 2026-07-01 yet.
New --- - Add a `Support Card Dating Schedule` that runs support-card recreation outings on a calendar of pinned turns, holding the final date for the `Pure Passion` buff and prioritizing outings over scheduled and `Smart Race Solver` races. New options for this have been added to the `Settings` page.
Adjustments --- - Update game data up to `Heirs to the Throne 2026-06-25`.
Fixes --- - Possible fix to `Database not initialized` crash.
